update.changelog:
What's new in 1.3.2:
- Added: 5 new platforms in Platform Hunter — Adobe, Flickr, Last.fm, XNXX, XVideos (11 total)
- Fixed: "No Internet Connection" false alert on Windows startup (cached remote-config + threaded fetch)
- Fixed: Slow app startup on no-internet connection (remote config now loads from cache first)
- Improved: Mobile-friendly platform cards + stats-mini layout for small screens
- Refactored: Platform Hunter JS now data-driven (easier to add future platforms)
